title: Coodoo Water Marbling Paint for Kids - Arts and Crafts for Girls & Boys Crafts Kits Ideal Gifts for Kids Age 6+ 8-12
features: 【Unleash & Spark Your Creativity】Instead of painting on paper or canvas, try painting on... water! With this arts & crafts you’ll learn the traditional technique of marbling paint . Free your creativity today and make beautiful patterns as unique as you are. Recommended crafts activities for ages 3 years and up

【A Fun and Educational Gift for All Ages】 No need for painting foundation,the water marbling paint set is suitable for kids in all ages and adults.Follow the instruction booklet, drop the paint on the drawing liquid，swirl to any pattern and transfer it on paper.So beautiful marble painted art,creative & fantastic water art supplies

【Safe and Nontoxic】Coodoo water marbling paint kit’s pigments and powder of art supply, which is safe, non-toxic and environmentally friendly. NOTE: please stir powder of art supply slowly in water until there is no big caking, and then use after standing for 4-5 hours. Success requires patience

【The Best Arts & Crafts Kits】Our coodoo Crafts Kits has everything you need and start on your marbling journey. It comes with 6 colors of paint in 16ml bottles, 20 sheets of paper, 3 needles, a pipette, spreader, measuring spoon, tray, and manual, which makes this art supplies crafts kits an ideal gifts option for kids

【WARMEST GIFT-GIVING IDEA】 Make this kids crafts a possible vacation bible school craft, arts and crafts classes projects, Stem projects or a simple DIY toys for daily kids activities, just see your little ones how to make their own unique patterns themselves by gifting it as gift on parents or grandparents day, Thanksgiving, Mother's Day, Father's Day, etc. This is a perfect easter gifts for kids.
description: Product Description Warm Tips - Readiness is all! It's suggested to prepare the painting liquid the night before you want to paint to allow enough time to dissolve, which takes approximately 3-5 hours. The prepared solution can be stored in a sealed bottle in a cool and dry place for next time use. (No more than a month). You can take the painting kit and the prepared solution anywhere for outdoor art activities.
